name: database
description: Database-agnostic schema patterns — PostgreSQL, SQLite, Supabase, Prisma, Drizzle

postgresql.create_table:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  display_name TEXT,
  avatar_url TEXT,
  role TEXT DEFAULT 'user' CHECK (role IN ('user', 'admin', 'moderator')),
  email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);
postgresql.indexes:
CREATE INDEX idx_users_email ON users(email);
CREATE INDEX idx_users_created_at ON users(created_at DESC);
postgresql.foreign_keys:
CREATE TABLE posts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  content TEXT,
  published BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

sqlite.create_table:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,
  password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,
  display_name TEXT,
  role TEXT DEFAULT 'user' CHECK (role IN ('user', 'admin', 'moderator')),
  email_verified INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
  updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
sqlite.indexes: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_users_email ON users(email);
sqlite.python_usage:
import sqlite3

def get_db():
    conn = sqlite3.connect('app.db')
    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    conn.execute('PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL')
    conn.execute('PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON')
    return conn

prisma.setup:
npm install prisma @prisma/client
npx prisma init
prisma.commands:
npx prisma migrate dev --name init    # Create migration & apply
npx prisma generate                    # Generate client
npx prisma db push                     # Push schema without migration
npx prisma studio                      # Visual DB editor
npx prisma db seed                     # Run seed script

drizzle.setup:
npm install drizzle-orm drizzle-kit
npm install @neondatabase/serverless  # for Neon
npm install pg                        # for node-postgres
drizzle.commands:
npx drizzle-kit generate    # Generate migration SQL
npx drizzle-kit migrate      # Run migrations
npx drizzle-kit push         # Push schema directly
npx drizzle-kit studio       # Visual browser UI

common_mistakes: Not enabling RLS on Supabase tables — anyone can read all data
Using TEXT for passwords instead of hashing — NEVER store plaintext passwords
Missing ON DELETE CASCADE — orphaned rows after parent deletion
No indexes on frequently queried columns — query performance degrades
Using SERIAL instead of UUID for public-facing IDs — sequential IDs are guessable
Not using transactions for multi-table operations — partial writes corrupt data
Storing timestamps without timezone — timezone bugs in production
Missing UNIQUE constraints on email/username — duplicate accounts
Not validating input before INSERT — SQL injection if using raw queries
Forgetting to run migrations in production — schema drift
security_requirements: ALWAYS hash passwords with bcrypt/argon2 — NEVER store plaintext
ALWAYS use parameterized queries — NEVER concatenate user input into SQL
ALWAYS enable RLS when using Supabase — data is public without it
ALWAYS use UUIDs for public-facing IDs — sequential IDs are enumerable
ALWAYS validate and sanitize input before database operations
NEVER expose database credentials in client-side code
NEVER use the service_role key on the client — anon key only
ALWAYS set up proper foreign key constraints with ON DELETE behavior
